productDisplayName: French Connection Women Pink Hot Fuzz Clutch
description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Pink and black square sequins all over the clutch upper with a black handle on top Push handle with fabric inner and a zipped pocket inside Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 21 cm Width: 34 cm Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features bold animal prints in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style.
